channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RASSIREF] Raasi Refractories Appoints Mahesh Vaddepalli as CFO
item.description:
Raasi Refractories Ltd. announced the appointment of Mr. Mahesh Vaddepalli as its Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP), effective April 24, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the appointment based on recommendations from the Nomination and Remuneration Committee and Audit Committee. Mr. Vaddepalli is a result-oriented finance professional with a robust background in taxation, auditing, and corporate compliance, gained from his experience at KBR & Associates. His expertise includes tax strategy, financial reporting, cash flow and liquidity management, and audit & internal controls. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Commerce. This appointment is expected to strengthen the company's financial leadership and support its strategic growth initiatives.

  • Mahesh Vaddepalli appointed CFO and KMP of Raasi Refractories.
  • Appointment effective April 24, 2026, approved by Board.
  • Vaddepalli brings strong background in finance, tax, and audit.
  • Aims to enhance financial integrity and optimize cash flows.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAASI REFRACTORIES LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SHRIRAMFIN] Shriram Finance FY26 Results Approved; ₹10.80/Share Total Dividend
item.description:
Shriram Finance Ltd.'s Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 24, 2026, approved the audited annual financial statements and results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹6/- per share (300%) for FY26, bringing the total dividend for the year to ₹10.80/- per share (540%), including the interim dividend. The record date for the final dividend is set for July 3, 2026. Additionally, the Board approved a resource mobilisation plan for FY27, including the issuance of debt securities. Key management changes were also approved, including the re-appointment of Mr. Parag Sharma as MD & CEO for five years and the appointment of two new Non-Executive Non-Independent Directors. M/s Pijush Gupta & Co. was appointed as the Tax Auditor for FY27. The 47th Annual General Meeting is scheduled for July 10, 2026.

  • Board approved audited annual and Q4 financial results for FY26.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ₹6/share, totaling ₹10.80/share for FY26.
  • Approved resource mobilisation plan for FY27 via debt securities.
  • Re-appointed Mr. Parag Sharma as MD & CEO for a five-year term.
  • Appointed Mr. Morihiko Fuji and Mr. Shinichi Fujinami as Additional Directors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shriram Finance Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KASTURI] Kasturi Metal Composite Board Meeting on April 30, 2026
item.description:
Kasturi Metal Composite Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on April 30, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026. The company has also announced the continuation of the trading window closure for designated employees until 48 hours after the declaration of the results. The information will be available on the company's website.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 30, 2026 to approve audited financial results.
  • Results are for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post result declaration.
  • Information will be available on the company website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kasturi Metal Composite Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHAKTIPR] Shakti Press Board Meeting on April 29, 2026
item.description:
Shakti Press Ltd has announced a meeting of its Board of Directors scheduled for April 29, 2026. The meeting agenda includes the consideration and approval of the Letter of Offer and Abridged Letter of Offer along with Application Forms, Rights Entitlement Letter, and other related documents.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 29, 2026.
  • Approval of Letter of Offer on the agenda.
  • Approval of Abridged Letter of Offer is also on the agenda.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHAKTI PRESS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZENSARTECH] Zensar Tech Revises Insider Trading Code, Approves Q4 FY26 Results & Dividend
item.description:
Zensar Technologies' Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 24, 2026, approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified auditor's opinion. The Board also recommended a final dividend of ₹12.60 per equity share (630%) for FY26, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming 63rd Annual General Meeting. Additionally, the company announced a revision and change in its Code of Fair Disclosure, Internal Procedures, and Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring and Reporting of Trading by Designated Persons and Immediate Relatives, along with its Legitimate Purpose Policy Code of Conduct, framed under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The amended code and other information will be available on the company's website. The trading window will open 48 hours after the financial results declaration.

  • Board approved audited Q4 and FY26 financial results with unmodified opinion.
  • Final dividend of ₹12.60 per share (630%) recommended for FY26.
  • Revised Insider Trading Code and Legitimate Purpose Policy approved.
  • Trading window to open 48 hours post financial results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ZENSAR TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Insider Trading

item.title: [BGPL] String Metaverse OFS successful; Board to consider bonus issue
item.description:
🔥 Trending

String Metaverse Limited announced the successful completion of its Offer for Sale (OFS), which saw strong investor participation. Non-retail investors subscribed approximately 149%, while retail investors significantly oversubscribed their portion by about 495%. This success is expected to bring the company into compliance with Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS) requirements. Following this, the Board of Directors is scheduled to meet on April 29, 2026, to consider a proposal for a bonus equity issue. The proposed bonus issue aims to reward public shareholders, enhance public shareholding and market liquidity, and align the company's ownership structure, with promoters potentially forgoing their entitlement to further increase public shareholding.

  • String Metaverse successfully completed its Offer for Sale.
  • Retail investors oversubscribed the OFS by approximately 495%.
  • The company expects to meet Minimum Public Shareholding requirements.
  • Board to meet on April 29, 2026, to consider a bonus issue.
  • Promoters may forgo bonus shares to increase public shareholding.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bio Green Papers Ltd | Category: Bonus

item.title: [CUB] City Union Bank Opens 2 New Branches, Reaching 980 Total
item.description:
🔥 Trending

City Union Bank Ltd announced the opening of two new branches on April 23, 2026, bringing the total number of branches to 980. The intimation was delayed due to a bank holiday in Tamil Nadu on the opening date and was submitted on April 24, 2026, in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • City Union Bank opened 2 new branches on April 23, 2026.
  • The bank's total branch count reached 980 as of April 23, 2026.
  • The announcement was delayed due to a bank holiday.
  • The filing complies with SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CITY UNION BANK LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MKEXIM] M.K. Exim confirms website compliance with SEBI LODR Reg 46
item.description:
M.K. Exim (India) Ltd responded to a SEBI observation regarding compliance with Regulation 46 of SEBI (LODR), 2015, which mandates a functional and updated company website. The company confirmed that its website, www.mkexim.com, is functional and updated in accordance with the regulations. It provided a detailed, pointwise reply listing 24 specific disclosures required under Regulation 46, along with direct links to each section on its website. The company apologized for any inconvenience caused by a potential technical glitch and committed to maintaining the website's functionality as per SEBI regulations.

  • M.K. Exim responded to SEBI observation on website compliance.
  • Company confirmed its website is functional and updated per Reg 46.
  • Provided direct links to 24 required disclosures on its website.
  • Apologized for any technical glitch causing inconvenience.
  • Undertook to maintain website functionality as per regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: M.K. Exim (India) Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [LICI] LIC Elevates Varadarajan Muthuvenkataraman to Senior Management
item.description:
Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC) announced the elevation of Mr. Varadarajan Muthuvenkataraman to the position of Senior Management Personnel (SMP) as Additional Executive Director (Enterprise Risk Management), Central Office, Mumbai. Previously, he served as Regional Manager, LIC Housing Finance Limited, Chennai. He joined LIC in 1992 and has held various leadership positions across different zones and departments, including a role at Life Insurance Corporation (Singapore) Pte Ltd.

  • Varadarajan Muthuvenkataraman appointed Additional Executive Director (Enterprise Risk Management).
  • Appointment effective as of the filing date.
  • Muthuvenkataraman has been with LIC since 1992, holding various key roles.
  • He previously served as Regional Manager at LIC Housing Finance Limited, Chennai.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Life Insurance Corporation of India | Category: Management Change

item.title: [OMAXAUTO] Omax Autos Board Meeting on May 2, 2026 to Approve Results
item.description:
Omax Autos Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 2, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Omax Autos board meeting set for May 2, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026.
  • Trading window reopens 48 hours post results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OMAX AUTOS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
